---
title: "pig-human-cow"
---

## Get pig-human-cow orthologs

```{r}
library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)

# ── Marts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl")
pig     <- useDataset("sscrofa_gene_ensembl",  mart = ensembl)
cow     <- useDataset("btaurus_gene_ensembl",  mart = ensembl)
human   <- useDataset("hsapiens_gene_ensembl", mart = ensembl)

# ── Raw ortholog queries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
homolog_attrs <- c(
  'ensembl_gene_id',
  'external_gene_name',
  'hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene',
  'hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name',
  'hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type',
  'hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence'
)

pig_human_orthologs <- getBM(attributes = homolog_attrs, mart = pig)
cow_human_orthologs <- getBM(attributes = homolog_attrs, mart = cow)

# ── Entrez ID queries ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pig_entrez   <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = pig)
cow_entrez   <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = cow)
human_entrez <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = human)

# ── Build species-pair tables ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
pig_human_complete <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(pig_entrezgene_id = entrezgene_id)

cow_human_complete <- cow_human_orthologs %>%
  left_join(cow_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(cow_entrezgene_id = entrezgene_id)

# ── Build three-way table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cow_pig_human_complete <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id                       = ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name                             = external_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id                         = entrezgene_id,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    human_entrez %>% rename(
      hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene = ensembl_gene_id,
      human_entrezgene_id           = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    cow_human_orthologs %>%
      select(
        hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene,
        cow_ensembl_gene_id    = ensembl_gene_id,
        cow_gene_name          = external_gene_name,
        cow_homolog_type       = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
        cow_homolog_confidence = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence
      ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    cow_entrez %>% rename(
      cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
      cow_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "cow_ensembl_gene_id"
  ) %>%
  select(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence,
    hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene,
    hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name,
    human_entrezgene_id,
    cow_ensembl_gene_id,
    cow_gene_name,
    cow_entrezgene_id,
    cow_homolog_type,
    cow_homolog_confidence
  )

# ── Species-pair 1-to-1 filters ────────────────────────────────────────────────
orthologs_1to1_ph <- pig_human_complete %>%
  filter(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
         hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1)

orthologs_1to1_ch <- cow_human_complete %>%
  filter(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
         hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1)

# ── Three-way 1-to-1 filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
orthologs_1to1_chp <- cow_pig_human_complete %>%
  filter(
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1,
    cow_homolog_type                          == "ortholog_one2one",
    cow_homolog_confidence                    == 1,
    !is.na(cow_ensembl_gene_id)
  ) %>%
  select(-pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
         -pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence,
         -cow_homolog_type,
         -cow_homolog_confidence)

write.csv(orthologs_1to1_ph,      "pig_human_orthologs_1to1.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(orthologs_1to1_ch,      "cow_human_orthologs_1to1.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(orthologs_1to1_chp,     "pig_cow_human_orthologs_1to1.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── Load experimental data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setwd("~/Desktop/Pan_virus_AI_Surrey_2026/")
df <- read_excel("pan_virus_surrey.xlsx")
dim(df)

# ── Initial merge: strict three-way 1to1 ──────────────────────────────────────
merged_df <- merge(orthologs_1to1_chp, df,
                   by.x = "hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name",
                   by.y = "Gene")
dim(merged_df)  # 3232 / 3934

# ── Identify unmatched genes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
unmatched_genes <- df$Gene[
  !df$Gene %in% orthologs_1to1_chp$hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name
]
cat(length(unmatched_genes), "unmatched genes\n")  # 702

# ── Helper: cow best-available lookup (shared across rescues) ─────────────────
cow_best <- cow_human_orthologs %>%
  filter(hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene != "") %>%
  group_by(hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene) %>%
  slice_max(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene,
    cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    cow_gene_name       = external_gene_name
  )

# ── Helper: aligns any tier to canonical columns, adding NAs if missing ───────
canonical_cols <- c(
  "hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name",
  "pig_ensembl_gene_id",
  "pig_gene_name",
  "pig_entrezgene_id",
  "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene",
  "human_entrezgene_id",
  "cow_ensembl_gene_id",
  "cow_gene_name",
  "cow_entrezgene_id",
  "ortholog_rescue"
)

align_to_canonical <- function(df) {
  for (col in canonical_cols) {
    if (!col %in% names(df)) df[[col]] <- NA
  }
  df %>% select(all_of(canonical_cols))
}

# ── Rescue 1: pig-human 1to1, cow optional ────────────────────────────────────
rescue_1to1_nocow <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  filter(
    hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name %in% unmatched_genes,
    hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
    hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1
  ) %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name       = external_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    human_entrez %>% rename(
      hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene = ensembl_gene_id,
      human_entrezgene_id           = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  left_join(cow_best, by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene") %>%
  left_join(
    cow_entrez %>% rename(
      cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
      cow_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "cow_ensembl_gene_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(ortholog_rescue = "1to1_pig_human_cow_optional")

still_after_r1 <- unmatched_genes[
  !unmatched_genes %in% rescue_1to1_nocow$hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name
]
cat(length(still_after_r1), "still unmatched after rescue 1\n")  # 285

# ── Rescue 2: one2many / many2many, best-confidence hit ───────────────────────
rescue_one2many <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  filter(
    hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name %in% still_after_r1,
    hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type %in% c("ortholog_one2many", "ortholog_many2many"),
    hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene != ""
  ) %>%
  group_by(hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name) %>%
  slice_max(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name       = external_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    human_entrez %>% rename(
      hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene = ensembl_gene_id,
      human_entrezgene_id           = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  left_join(cow_best, by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene") %>%
  left_join(
    cow_entrez %>% rename(
      cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
      cow_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "cow_ensembl_gene_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(ortholog_rescue = "one2many_best")

still_after_r2 <- still_after_r1[
  !still_after_r1 %in% rescue_one2many$hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name
]
cat(length(still_after_r2), "still unmatched after rescue 2\n")

# ── Rescue 3: confirmed 1to1 with no cow ortholog ─────────────────────────────
confirmed_1to1_nocow <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  filter(
    hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name %in% still_after_r2,
    hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
    hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1
  ) %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name       = external_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    human_entrez %>% rename(
      hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene = ensembl_gene_id,
      human_entrezgene_id           = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  left_join(cow_best, by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene") %>%
  left_join(
    cow_entrez %>% rename(
      cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
      cow_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "cow_ensembl_gene_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(ortholog_rescue = "1to1_pig_human_no_cow")

still_after_r3 <- still_after_r2[
  !still_after_r2 %in% confirmed_1to1_nocow$hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name
]
cat(length(still_after_r3), "genuinely unresolvable\n")
still_after_r3

# ── Final assembly ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
orthologs_rescue_all <- bind_rows(
  orthologs_1to1_chp %>%
    mutate(ortholog_rescue = "1to1_all_three") %>%
    align_to_canonical(),
  align_to_canonical(rescue_1to1_nocow),
  align_to_canonical(rescue_one2many),
  align_to_canonical(confirmed_1to1_nocow)
)

# ── Merge with experimental data ───────────────────────────────────────────────
merged_df_complete <- df %>%
  left_join(orthologs_rescue_all,
            by = c("Gene" = "hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name"))

# ── Coverage summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
table(merged_df_complete$ortholog_rescue, useNA = "always")
cat("pig ID coverage:   ", sum(!is.na(merged_df_complete$pig_ensembl_gene_id)), "/", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("human ID coverage: ", sum(!is.na(merged_df_complete$hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene)), "/", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("cow ID coverage:   ", sum(!is.na(merged_df_complete$cow_ensembl_gene_id)), "/", nrow(df), "\n")

# ── Drop uninformative columns and save ───────────────────────────────────────
merged_df_complete <- merged_df_complete %>%
  select(-ortholog_rescue)

write.csv(merged_df_complete, "merged_orthologs_panvirus_complete.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
